name: FAB Purchase Verification
description: FAB Marketplace purchase verification with configurable reusable product badges.

fields.label: FAB Session Cookie
fields.description: Seller fab_sessionid Cookie used to verify buyer orders. Find it in FAB browser cookies and update it periodically.

fields.label: Purchase history URL
fields.description: Users can open this page to find their FAB order ID.

fields.label: Verifiable products
fields.description: JSON array. Each item needs key and name; key generates reusable badge_key and name is used for the default badge label.

fields.label: Require manual admin approval
fields.description: When enabled, successful FAB API checks remain pending until an admin approves them.

plugin.description.zh-CN: 通过 FAB 订单号验证买家购买身份，认证后在论坛显示专属徽章。
plugin.description.en-US: Verify buyer identity via FAB order ID and display a verified badge on the forum.

config.fabSession.description.zh-CN: 卖家账号的 fab_sessionid Cookie 值，用于代表卖家验证买家订单。可在 FAB 网站浏览器 Cookie 中找到，定期需要更新。
config.fabSession.description.en-US: Seller fab_sessionid Cookie used to verify buyer orders. Find it in FAB browser cookies and update it periodically.

config.products.description.zh-CN: JSON 数组。每项至少包含 key 和 name；key 用于生成可复用 badge_key，name 用于默认勋章名。
config.products.description.en-US: JSON array. Each item needs key and name; key generates reusable badge_key and name is used for the default badge label.

config.manualApprove.description.zh-CN: 开启后，即使 FAB API 验证通过也保持待审核状态，需管理员在后台手动确认。
config.manualApprove.description.en-US: When enabled, successful FAB API checks remain pending until an admin approves them.

settings.description.zh-CN: 订单用于审核，产品从插件配置中选择，审核通过后发放对应勋章。
settings.description.en-US: Orders are reviewed against products configured by the plugin. Approved orders grant matching badges.

settings.duplicateProduct.zh-CN: 这个产品已经申请过或已认证
settings.duplicateProduct.en-US: This product is already requested or verified

settings.responseFormatError.zh-CN: FAB API 响应格式错误

settings.pickProductAfterApiError.zh-CN: {error}；请选择认证产品后提交待审核
settings.pickProductAfterApiError.en-US: {error}; select a verification product and submit for review

settings.submitted.zh-CN: 订单已提交，请等待管理员审核
settings.submitted.en-US: Order submitted. Please wait for admin review

config.purchaseUrl.description.zh-CN: 用户点击“查看订单 ID”时打开的购买记录页面。
config.purchaseUrl.description.en-US: Purchase history page opened by the View order ID button.

settings.viewOrderIdHint.zh-CN: 前往 Epic Games 购买记录查看订单 ID。
settings.viewOrderIdHint.en-US: Open Epic Games purchase history to find your order ID.

css: .fab-card{border:1px solid var(--border,#30363d);border-radius:12px;margin-top:12px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(88,166,255,.04),rgba(22,27,34,.92));overflow:hidden}.fab-card-hd{padding:12px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border,#30363d);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px}.fab-card-title{min-width:0}.fab-card-hd h3{margin:0 0 4px;font-size:16px}.fab-card-hd p{margin:0;color:var(--muted,#8b949e);font-size:13px}.fab-card-body{padding:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;min-height:0}.fab-status{padding:0;font-size:13px}.fab-form{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(160px,.9fr) minmax(240px,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:0}.fab-form input,.fab-form select{flex:1;min-height:36px;border:1px solid var(--border,#30363d);border-radius:8px;background:#0b1017;color:#e6edf3;padding:0 10px;outline:none;font:inherit;font-size:13px;transition:border-color .14s}.fab-form input:focus{border-color:var(--accent,#58a6ff)}.fab-card-actions{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;gap:8px;flex:0 0 auto}.fab-card-hd button,.fab-card-hd .fab-order-help{height:36px;padding:0 16px;border:1px solid var(--accent,#58a6ff);border-radius:8px;font:inherit;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .15s,border-color .15s,background-color .15s,color .15s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;white-space:nowrap;text-decoration:none}.fab-card-hd button{background:var(--accent,#58a6ff);color:#fff}.fab-card-hd .fab-order-help{background:rgba(88,166,255,.06);color:var(--text,#e6edf3);border-color:var(--border,#30363d)}.fab-card-hd .fab-order-help:hover{border-color:var(--accent,#58a6ff);color:var(--accent,#58a6ff);background:rgba(88,166,255,.1)}.fab-card-hd button:hover{opacity:.86}.fab-card-hd button:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:wait}.fab-ok{color:#3fb950}.fab-warn{color:#d2991d}.fab-err{color:#f85149}.fab-order-list{display:grid;gap:8px;margin:8px 0 12px;max-height:230px;overflow:auto;padding-right:4px;align-content:start}.fab-order-list::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px}.fab-order-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(88,166,255,.45);border-radius:999px}.fab-order-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto auto;align-items:center;gap:10px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border,#30363d);border-radius:10px;background:rgba(13,17,23,.45);padding:10px}.fab-order-row strong{display:block;min-width:0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}.fab-order-row small{display:block;margin-top:3px;color:var(--muted,#8b949e);font-size:12px}.fab-order-row>.fab-ok,.fab-order-row>.fab-warn,.fab-order-row>.fab-err{white-space:nowrap}.fab-card .badge-chip{width:30px;height:30px;padding:0;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0;overflow:hidden}.fab-card .badge-chip span:last-child{display:none}.fab-card .badge-chip-img{width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover}.fab-card .badge-chip-icon{width:20px;height:20px;display:grid;place-items:center;border-radius:50%;font-size:10px;line-height:1;background:rgba(5,10,18,.45)}.fab-admin-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;border:1px solid var(--border,#30363d);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--surface,#161b22)}.fab-admin-table th{padding:8px 10px;text-align:left;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted,#8b949e);background:#111821;white-space:nowrap}.fab-admin-table td{padding:10px 10px;border-top:1px solid var(--border,#30363d);font-size:13px;vertical-align:middle}.fab-action-btn{padding:3px 10px;border-radius:6px;background:transparent;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;transition:opacity .14s}.fab-action-btn:disabled{opacity:.45;cursor:wait}.fab-action-btn:hover{opacity:.75}@media(max-width:820px){.fab-form{grid-template-columns:1fr}.fab-order-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
